title: T-023 — API: release-to-warehouse flag toggle
prompt:
Implement endpoint `POST /api/planning/work-orders/:id/release-to-warehouse` per PRD §12.2 (FR-PLAN-031). Guard: wo.status ∈ {RELEASED, IN_PROGRESS} AND wo_materials.count > 0 OR is_rework=true. Side-effect: set released_to_warehouse=true; emit outbox event 'wo.released_to_warehouse'. Reverse endpoint `POST /api/planning/work-orders/:id/un-release-to-warehouse` (admin-only, requires reason min 10 chars per §12.4).

RED test asserts guard rejects DRAFT status, success on RELEASED, un-release requires admin role + reason.

pipeline_inputs.description: Toggle Scanner M06 visibility flag for a WO with admin-gated reverse path.
pipeline_inputs.details: Outbox event payload includes wo_id, tenant_id, warehouse_id, materials_count, released_at, released_by. Un-release endpoint checks user has 'planning.wo.un_release' RBAC; logs to wo_status_history.context_jsonb with reason. Guard error returns HTTP 409 + code 'WO_NOT_READY_FOR_WAREHOUSE'.
acceptance_criteria: Given a WO at status='DRAFT', when release-to-warehouse runs, then HTTP 409 with code 'WO_NOT_READY_FOR_WAREHOUSE'.
Given a WO at status='RELEASED' with wo_materials count=3, when release-to-warehouse runs, then released_to_warehouse=true and outbox event 'wo.released_to_warehouse' is emitted.
Given un-release called by a non-admin, when validated, then HTTP 403; with admin role + reason ≥ 10 chars, then released_to_warehouse=false.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/server/actions/planning/__tests__/release-to-warehouse.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED tests for guard, side-effect, RBAC on un-release, audit log.
risk_red_lines: Do not let non-admin callers un-release.
Do not skip outbox emit — Scanner queue refresh depends on it.
